description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows arranged in both horizontal and vertical patterns, allowing for ample natural light. The house features a spacious outdoor deck area with lounge furniture, a swimming pool, and a separate patio with an umbrella and sunbeds. There are several trees and landscaped elements surrounding the property, enhancing its suburban appeal. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and a small set of stepping stones leading up to it. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing contemporary architectural trends.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large windows, outdoor deck, pool, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, large windows, outdoor deck, pool, sunbeds, umbrella, and a prominent tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid white wall, minimal windows, stepping stones to the entry, and patio furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, a secondary entry, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the deck, pool, sunbeds, and the geometric structure of the house with its flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal and vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with stepping stones, no porch, minimal overhang, and clean lines
